step_rationale: Oxidative stress marker; associated with plaque oxidative burden and instability.
mechanism: Lactoperoxidase-mediated oxidative stress contributes to lipoprotein oxidation and plaque destabilization.

references.title: Oxidation and endothelial dysfunction biomarkers of atherosclerotic plaque instability. Studies of the vascular wall and blood.
references.journal: Bulletin of experimental biology and medicine
